all.en: This notice announces the start of our annual financial audit.
all.zh: 本公告宣布年度財務稽核作業即將啟動。

all.en: The external audit firm has been engaged for the seventh consecutive year.
all.zh: 外部稽核事務所已連續第七年受聘執行查核。

all.en: Fieldwork will begin on the first Monday of next month.
all.zh: 實地稽核將於下個月第一個週一展開。

all.en: The audit period covers the fiscal year ending in December.
all.zh: 稽核期間涵蓋至十二月為止之會計年度。

all.en: All departments are expected to cooperate fully with the auditors.
all.zh: 各部門均應全面配合稽核人員。

all.en: A kickoff meeting will be held with all department heads.
all.zh: 將與各部門主管召開正式啟動會議。

all.en: Auditors will request supporting documents for sampled transactions.
all.zh: 稽核員將要求抽核交易之佐證文件。

all.en: Please respond to document requests within two business days.
all.zh: 請於兩個營業日內回覆文件調閱請求。

all.en: Original signed contracts must be available upon request.
all.zh: 原始簽署合約須於申請時提供。

all.en: Inventory observation will take place at all warehouse locations.
all.zh: 存貨盤點觀察將於所有倉庫據點進行。

all.en: Operations teams should prepare cycle counts in advance.
all.zh: 營運團隊應事先安排循環盤點作業。

all.en: Bank confirmations will be sent directly to financial institutions.
all.zh: 銀行詢證函將直接寄送至各金融機構。

all.en: Customer confirmations will go out for major accounts receivable balances.
all.zh: 重大應收帳款餘額將寄發客戶函證。

all.en: Auditors will assess internal controls over financial reporting.
all.zh: 稽核員將評估財務報導之內部控制。

all.en: Walkthroughs of key processes are scheduled for the second week.
all.zh: 主要流程逐步測試排定於第二週進行。

all.en: Findings will be communicated in regular status meetings.
all.zh: 查核發現將於定期狀況會議中告知。

all.en: Material weaknesses must be disclosed in the audit report.
all.zh: 重大缺失須於稽核報告中揭露。

all.en: Management responses to findings are due within ten days.
all.zh: 對查核發現之管理層回應須於十日內提出。

all.en: The audit committee will review preliminary results next quarter.
all.zh: 稽核委員會將於下季審閱初步結果。

all.en: Final audited statements are targeted for release in March.
all.zh: 最終財務報表目標於三月對外發布。

all.en: Confidentiality of audit communications must be strictly maintained.
all.zh: 稽核相關通訊之機密性務必嚴格維護。

all.en: Please direct procedural questions to the internal audit liaison.
all.zh: 程序性疑問請洽內部稽核聯絡窗口。

all.en: Your timely cooperation ensures a smooth and successful audit.
all.zh: 您及時的配合可確保稽核順利完成。

all.en: A secure data room has been set up for auditors to access digital files.
all.zh: 已為稽核員設置安全資料室，供其調閱電子檔案。

all.en: Information technology teams will support read only access to financial systems.
all.zh: 資訊技術團隊將協助提供財務系統之唯讀存取權限。

all.en: Subsidiary companies will undergo coordinated audits in their respective jurisdictions.
all.zh: 各子公司將於所屬司法管轄區內進行同步稽核。

all.en: Tax provision schedules require special review by the senior tax specialist.
all.zh: 稅務準備明細須由資深稅務專員特別覆核。

all.en: Lease accounting under the new standards will be examined in detail.
all.zh: 依新準則之租賃會計將接受詳細查核。

all.en: Revenue recognition testing focuses on contracts above one million dollars.
all.zh: 收入認列測試聚焦於合約金額超過一百萬美元者。

all.en: Goodwill impairment assessments must be supported by independent valuation reports.
all.zh: 商譽減損評估須有獨立評價報告支持。

all.en: Related party transactions should be fully documented with board approval records.
all.zh: 關係人交易須備齊董事會核准紀錄之完整文件。

all.en: Subsequent events through the report date receive additional scrutiny.
all.zh: 至報告日止之期後事項將接受額外審查。

all.en: Thank you for your dedication during this important annual exercise.
all.zh: 感謝各位於此一年度重要工作中所展現的投入。

all.en: Sampling methodology selections are based on risk assessments performed during planning.
all.zh: 抽樣方法之選擇係依規劃階段所進行之風險評估而定。

all.en: Journal entry testing covers both manual postings and automated system transactions.
all.zh: 傳票測試涵蓋人工分錄及自動化系統交易。

all.en: Year over year fluctuation analysis identifies accounts requiring substantive procedures.
all.zh: 逐年波動分析辨識需執行實質程序之科目。

all.en: Management representation letters must be signed before the audit opinion is issued.
all.zh: 管理階層聲明書須於發布稽核意見前完成簽署。

all.en: Going concern evaluations consider cash flow projections for the next twelve months.
all.zh: 繼續經營評估需考量未來十二個月之現金流量預測。

all.en: Pension and post retirement benefit calculations require actuarial valuation reports.
all.zh: 退休金與離職後福利計算須有精算評價報告。

all.en: Internal control deficiencies are categorized by severity using established professional standards.
all.zh: 內部控制缺失依專業準則所訂之嚴重程度分類。

all.en: Audit committee presentations highlight key risk areas and recommended remediation plans.
all.zh: 稽核委員會簡報強調主要風險區域與建議改善方案。

all.en: Engagement letters specify scope, timeline, fees, and responsibilities for both parties.
all.zh: 委任書載明雙方之範圍、時程、酬金與責任。

all.en: We welcome any questions or concerns throughout this collaborative audit process.
all.zh: 本協作稽核過程中歡迎提出任何問題或疑慮。
